command: export DISPLAY=:99 && export WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine && export WINEDEBUG=-all && export STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && echo '=== Compiling EA ===' && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && wine MetaEditor64.exe /compile:'MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log /include:'MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot' 2>&1 && sleep 15 && echo '=== Check .ex5 after compile ===' && find 'MQL5/Experts' -name 'PropFirmBot.ex5' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Compile log ===' && cat 'MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.log' 2>/dev/null | tail -30
